as_of_alignment: The window ending at date t fits the OU to each name's cumulative residual over r_{t-60+1}..r_t; s-scores at t use data <= t only. Consumers must not execute before t+1.
note: On the real pipeline X_last ~ 0 (QR4.3 residuals sum to zero), so the s-score reduces to ~ -m/sigma_eq; the OU equilibrium m carries the signal.
